nodes.label: **1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.** Bonsai 8B demonstrates production-quality output at 1.1…
nodes.description: **1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.** Bonsai 8B demonstrates production-quality output at 1.15 GB. Designing for 1-bit from training, rather than 4/8-bit post-quantization, will become the standard for edge LLMs. Expect 1-bit derivatives of the Qwen and Llama families to follow within the next quarter.

prediction_summary_locales.es: **Indirect prompt injection becomes a top CVE category.** Successful attacks are up +190% YoY, and CVE-2025-53773-style flaws (RCE from PR body) reproduce easily. By Q3 2026, CVSS 8.0+ LLM-integration CVEs will be a Patch Tuesday regular.

description.en: **GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF, RCE) makes visible the fact that "model files themselves are carriers of executable code." By Q3 2026, Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope will require model-card + chat_template signature verification or sandboxed execution as a baseline; Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM will enable SSTI scanning by default at GGUF load time.
description.ja: **「GGUF 供給経路」がサプライチェーン攻撃の新しい主戦場** — SGLang CVE-2026-5760（GGUF 経由の Jinja2 SSTI で RCE）は「モデルファイル自体が実行可能コードのキャリア」である現実を可視化した。2026 Q3 までに Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope は **モデルカード + chat_template の署名検証／サンドボックス実行** を標準要件化し、Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM も GGUF ロード時に SSTI スキャンをデフォルト有効化する。
description.es: **GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF, RCE) makes visible the fact that "model files themselves are carriers of executable code." nodes.description: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming.

description.en: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming.
description.ja: **AI エージェント・セキュリティ標準が「第三者ベンダ境界」と「URL 命名ハンデン」まで広がる** — Anthropic Mythos の未認可アクセス（外注＋命名規則推測＋サードパーティ流出データの組み合わせ）は、Vercel–Context.ai サプライチェーン侵害と同じ構造を frontier モデルアクセス制御で再演した。2026 Q3 には「フロンティアモデルプレビュー／早期アクセスの第三者ベンダ環境」は SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum の共通セキュリティベースラインを満たすことが事実上必須化し、エンドポイント URL / サブドメインは推測困難なランダム文字列ベースの命名に強制移行する。
description.es: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming.

By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **AI エージェント・セキュリティ標準が「第三者ベンダ境界」と「URL 命名ハンデン」まで広がる** — Anthropic Mythos の未認可アクセス（外注＋命名規則推測＋サードパーティ流出データの組み合わせ）は、Vercel–Context.ai サプライチェーン侵害と同じ構造を frontier モデルアクセス制御で再演した。2026 Q3 には「フロンティアモデルプレビュー／早期アクセスの第三者ベンダ環境」は SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum の共通セキュリティベースラインを満たすことが事実上必須化し、エンドポイント URL / サブドメインは推測困難なランダム文字列ベースの命名に強制移行する。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming.

description.en: **"Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's **8 hours / 90% success / 60 totes/hour** at Erlangen — on the production line, not a demo — is a clear graduation point from "humanoid = PoC." By Q4 2026, big-manufacturer RFPs (VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota) will fold "24h continuous operation," "1-week MTBF," "90%+ autonomous completion rate," and "MES / PLC integration" into de facto cuts. The competitive axis for Physical AI shifts entirely from "good-looking demo videos" to "ease of insertion into existing OT environments."
description.ja: **「Physical AI の 8 時間本番稼働」が 2026 後半のエンタープライズ調達条件に** — Siemens–Humanoid の HMND 01 Alpha が Erlangen で「デモではなく本番ライン」で **8 時間 / 90% 成功率 / 60 tote/h** を達成したことは、「ヒューマノイド = PoC」の段階からの明確な卒業点。2026 Q4 までに大手製造業（VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / トヨタ）の RFP から「24 時間連続稼働実績」「1 週間 MTBF」「90%+ 自律完了率」「既存 MES / PLC 統合」が事実上の足切り条件に組み込まれ、Physical AI の競争軸は「見栄えの良いデモ動画」から「既存 OT 環境への差し込み容易性」に完全に移る。

nodes.description: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters.

description.en: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters.
description.ja: **「AI エージェントに displace されるエンタープライズ SaaS」の金融市場評価が 2026 Q2 中にリセット** — ServiceNow の Apr 23 の **-18%（過去最悪の 1 日下落）** と IBM の同日下落、Salesforce / Workday / Oracle の連鎖下落は、「AI のコスト削減恩恵 < AI による既存ワークフロー自動化による displace」への資本市場の評価軸シフトの現れ。2026 Q2 中に Gartner / Forrester の Magic Quadrant / Wave 系レポートで「Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS」の二軸化が明示され、時価総額評価は「シート数 × ARPU」から「エージェントが触る API 呼び出しの占有度」に移行。アナリストコンセンサス更新の遅行により、向こう 2 四半期で同様の 15%+ 暴落が Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet など 3-5 社で再発。
description.es: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters.

Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters.

nodes.description: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** — a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls — was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category.

description.en: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** — a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls — was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category.
description.ja: **「MCP プロトコル自体への攻撃面」が 2026 Q3 までにエンタープライズ AI 採用の最大ボトルネックに** — Nginx UI **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** の「`/mcp_message` エンドポイントが空デフォルト IP 許可リストで未認証 12 ツール呼び出し可能」という構造的欠陥が VulnCheck KEV 追加 + 実環境で 2 リクエストで完全乗っ取り達成という事実は、MCP プロトコルそのものを「ウェブ標準として再設計」しなければスケールしないシグナル。2026 Q3 までに OWASP MCP Top 10 が正式公開され、**Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare による MCP-over-mTLS / 標準 OAuth scope 仕様** が業界標準化、Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security 等が「MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall」プロダクトを Q4 までに次々投入、エンタープライズの「MCP 接続ツール数 / 接続先 / 認可ポリシー」が新たなコンプライアンス監査項目として定着する。

nodes.label: **Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain" — Q3 2026 sees the first AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) with mandat…
nodes.description: **Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain" — Q3 2026 sees the first AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) with mandatory NVD tagging.** The Apr 19-26 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + the Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — composes a clear "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. By Q3 2026, NIST/NVD adds a dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag to its CVE schema, OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** to a top-3 entry, and supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ships **per-engine signature feeds for vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** as standard SKUs.

short_label.ja: 推論サーバが新たな「プリミティブのサプライチェーン」になる
short_label.es: Los servidores de inferencia se convier…

description.en: **Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain" — Q3 2026 sees the first AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) with mandatory NVD tagging.** The Apr 19-26 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + the Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — composes a clear "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. By Q3 2026, NIST/NVD adds a dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag to its CVE schema, OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** to a top-3 entry, and supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ships **per-engine signature feeds for vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** as standard SKUs.
description.ja: **推論サーバが新たな「プリミティブのサプライチェーン」になる — Q3 2026 に AI インフラ専用 CVE クラス (LLM-INFRA-CWE) が NVD タグ付け必須化される最初のケースが登場。** 4/19-26 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分で攻撃成立)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar による Antigravity の `find_by_name -X` サンドボックス エスケープ** + 4/21 の Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot をまたいだ Comment-and-Control プロンプト インジェクション — が「推論ランタイム + エージェンティック CI」攻撃面のカテゴリーを形成。Q3 2026 までに NIST/NVD が CVE スキーマに **「AI-Infra」専用タグ**を追加、OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 が **「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」** をトップ 3 に格上げ、Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera が **vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama 各エンジン用の署名フィード**を標準 SKU として提供開始。
description.es: **Los servidores de inferencia se convierten en la nueva "cadena de suministro de primitivos" — el T3 2026 verá la primera clase de CVE específica de infraestructura AI (LLM-INFRA-CWE) con etiquetado obligatorio en NVD.** La secuencia 19/4-26/4 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 h 31 min explotado)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) RCE Jinja2 SSTI** + **escape de sandbox de Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + la cadena Comment-and-Control del 21/4 sobre Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — compone una categoría clara de superficie de ataque "runtime de inferencia + CI agéntico". Para el T3 2026, NIST/NVD añade una etiqueta dedicada **"AI-Infra"** a su esquema CVE, OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** al top 3 y el tooling SBOM (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) entrega **feeds de firmas por motor para vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** como SKUs estándar.
description.fil: **Magiging bagong "primitive supply chain" ang inference servers — sa Q3 2026 lalabas ang unang AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) na may mandatory NVD tagging.** Ang sequence ng Apr 19-26 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape sa pamamagitan ng `find_by_name -X`** + ang Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — ay bumubuo ng malinaw na "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, magdadagdag ang NIST/NVD ng dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag sa CVE schema nito, ipo-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** sa top-3 entry, at maglalabas ang supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ng **per-engine signature feeds para sa vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** bilang standard SKUs.

summary.en: **Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain" — Q3 2026 sees the first AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) with mandatory NVD tagging.** The Apr 19-26 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + the Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — composes a clear "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. nodes.label: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Iden…
nodes.description: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel.

short_label.ja: AI への世論的反発が拘束力のあるエージェント ガバナンス規則へ転化
short_label.es: El rechazo público a la IA se convierte…

description.en: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel.
description.ja: **AI への世論的反発が拘束力のあるエージェント ガバナンス規則へ転化 — Q3 2026 までに米国の少なくとも 1 州が、Okta の Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway パターンを反映した「自律エージェントの法定アイデンティティ」法を可決。** 4/16 の Altman 自宅襲撃 + 4/15 CNBC のデータセンター反発記事 + 4/26 Salt Security データ (「組織の 48.9% が AI エージェント トラフィックを監視できていない」) + **4/30** Okta for AI Agents GA (Agent Discovery、Agent Gateway、仮想 MCP サーバ レジストリ、認証情報のボールティング + 自動ローテーション、ユニバーサル ログアウト) が規制を前倒しで引き寄せる。米国の州 (CA、NY、TX のいずれかが有力) が Q3 2026 までに **「エージェントを第一級アイデンティティとして登録、MCP コール チェーンのロギング、アクションごとの同意」** を義務付ける法令を成立させ、Cross App Access プロトコルのセマンティクスを反映。EU AI Act 第 26 条施行も並行して始動。
description.es: **El rechazo público a la IA se convierte en reglas vinculantes de gobernanza de agentes — para el Q3 2026 al menos un estado de EE. UU. promulga una ley de "Identidad Estatutaria para Agentes Autónomos" que refleja el patrón Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway de Okta.** Los ataques del 16/04 a la casa de Altman + el artículo de la CNBC del 15/04 sobre el rechazo a los centros de datos + los datos del 26/04 de Salt Security ("48,9% de las orgs no pueden monitorear el tráfico de agentes de IA") + la GA de Okta for AI Agents el **30/04** (con Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, registro virtual de servidores MCP, vault de credenciales + rotación automática, logout universal) componen un adelanto regulatorio. Un estado de EE. UU. (CA, NY o TX como candidatos probables) aprueba un estatuto para el Q3 2026 que obliga al **registro del agente como identidad de primera clase, registro de cadenas de llamadas MCP y consentimiento por acción**, reflejando la semántica del protocolo Cross App Access. La aplicación del Artículo 26 de la EU AI Act se activa en paralelo.
description.fil: **Magiging binding agent-governance rules ang public-opinion blowback laban sa AI — pagdating ng Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang US state ang magpapalabas ng "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act na nagre-replikate sa Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern ng Okta.** Ang 4/16 attacks sa bahay ni Altman + 4/15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + 4/26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA sa **4/30** (kasama ang Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) ang bumubuo ng regulatory pull-forward. Isang US state (CA, NY, o TX malamang) ang magpasa ng statute pagdating ng Q3 2026 na nag-uutos ng **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, at per-action consent**, na nagre-replikate sa Cross App Access protocol semantics. Mag-trigger din nang sabay ang EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement.

summary.en: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel.

UU. promulga una ley de "Identidad Estatutaria para Agentes Autónomos" que refleja el patrón Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway de Okta.** Los ataques del 16/04 a la casa de Altman + el artículo de la CNBC del 15/04 sobre el rechazo a los centros de datos + los datos del 26/04 de Salt Security ("48,9% de las orgs no pueden monitorear el tráfico de agentes de IA") + la GA de Okta for AI Agents el **30/04** (con Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, registro virtual de servidores MCP, vault de credenciales + rotación automática, logout universal) componen un adelanto regulatorio. Un estado de EE. UU. (CA, NY o TX como candidatos probables) aprueba un estatuto para el Q3 2026 que obliga al **registro del agente como identidad de primera clase, registro de cadenas de llamadas MCP y consentimiento por acción**, reflejando la semántica del protocolo Cross App Access. La aplicación del Artículo 26 de la EU AI Act se activa en paralelo.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Magiging binding agent-governance rules ang public-opinion blowback laban sa AI — pagdating ng Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang US state ang magpapalabas ng "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act na nagre-replikate sa Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern ng Okta.** Ang 4/16 attacks sa bahay ni Altman + 4/15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + 4/26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA sa **4/30** (kasama ang Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) ang bumubuo ng regulatory pull-forward. Isang US state (CA, NY, o TX malamang) ang magpasa ng statute pagdating ng Q3 2026 na nag-uutos ng **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, at per-action consent**, na nagre-replikate sa Cross App Access protocol semantics. Mag-trigger din nang sabay ang EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement.

nodes.label: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** S…
nodes.description: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.

description.en: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.
description.ja: **推論サーバSSTIが単発CVEからOWASP LLM Top-10 v2026項目へ昇格 — CISAは2026年Q3までに「AI-Infra KEV」サブカタログを公開する。** SGLang CVE-2026-5760(CVSS 9.8)は4/28時点でも**未パッチ**(開示後10日以上)、公開PoCがあり、`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` 不使用のJinja2の同型がvLLM / LMDeploy / 周辺推論サーバを横断するコピペクラスとして指摘されている。**4/27-28のTotolink CVE 4連発(7153/7154/7156/7202、すべて9.8)**、**Cisco ISE 認証不要RCE**、**simple-git CVE-2026-6951 のCI/CD向けRCE**、**PillarのAntigravity サンドボックスエスケープ(`find_by_name -X`経由)**、Google / Forcepoint の**間接プロンプトインジェクション 32% YoY 増加** + 10件の野生ペイロードを合わせると、NIST / CISAへの圧力が結晶化する。**2026年Q3までにCISAは専用「AI-Infra」KEVサブカタログ**を公開し、推論サーバ(vLLM / SGLang / Ollama / llama.cpp / LMDeploy)とエージェント型CIランタイム(Claude Code / Codex / Antigravity / OpenClaw)に対するSBOMタグ付けを義務化する。OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をTop-3に格上げする。
description.es: **El SSTI en servidores de inferencia se gradúa de CVE puntual a entrada en OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026; CISA publicará un sub-catálogo "AI-Infra KEV" para Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9,8) **sigue sin parche al 28 abr** (10+ días post-divulgación), con PoC público y la misma forma de Jinja2-sin-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` ahora marcada como una clase de copia-pega que abarca vLLM, LMDeploy y servidores de inferencia adyacentes. Combinado con el **cuádruple CVE Totolink del 27-28 abr (7153/7154/7156/7202, todos 9,8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE en CI/CD**, **escape de sandbox Antigravity de Pillar vía `find_by_name -X`**, y el **aumento del 32% YoY en inyección indirecta de prompt** de Google/Forcepoint con 10 payloads en estado salvaje — la presión sobre NIST/CISA cristaliza. **Para Q3 2026 CISA publicará un sub-catálogo dedicado "AI-Infra" KEV** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio sobre servidores de inferencia (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) y runtimes agénticos de CI (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" al top-3.
description.fil: **Ang Inference-server SSTI ay magta-graduate mula one-off CVE patungong OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; magpa-publish ang CISA ng "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) ay **hindi pa rin patched hanggang Apr 28** (10+ araw post-disclosure), na may public PoC at parehong Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape na ngayon flagged bilang copy-paste class na sumasaklaw sa vLLM, LMDeploy, at adjacent inference servers. Pagsamahin sa **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, lahat 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, at sa **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** ng Google/Forcepoint na may 10 in-the-wild payloads — nagcrystallize ang pressure sa NIST/CISA. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026 magpapadala ang CISA ng dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging sa inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) at agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" sa top-3.

OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.

nodes.description: **(Non-tech) Powell's Apr 29 decision to remain on the Board of Governors past his Chair-term expiration (May 15) reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology — by Q4 2026 the FOMC reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2 dissenters) under Warsh as Chair, but Powell's continued Board presence becomes the marginal swing vote on the Fed-investigation governance question, not on rates.** Apr 29 was the highest-dissent FOMC since Oct-1992 (8-4); Miran wanted -25bp; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan opposed easing-bias inclusion. Warsh nomination advanced from Senate Banking same day. The 2026-2027 setup: Powell on Board through term-end 2028 with Warsh in the Chair seat; the dissent posture compresses on rate calls because the Chair sets the framing; Powell's marginal vote becomes a governance signal whenever the Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome moves. Markets price a smaller forward-guidance volatility on rates but a larger institutional-risk premium on the Fed itself. The 1992-precedent comparison stops being a curiosity and starts being a structural reference point in financial-press explanations of the new Fed governance regime.

description.en: **(Non-tech) Powell's Apr 29 decision to remain on the Board of Governors past his Chair-term expiration (May 15) reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology — by Q4 2026 the FOMC reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2 dissenters) under Warsh as Chair, but Powell's continued Board presence becomes the marginal swing vote on the Fed-investigation governance question, not on rates.** Apr 29 was the highest-dissent FOMC since Oct-1992 (8-4); Miran wanted -25bp; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan opposed easing-bias inclusion. Warsh nomination advanced from Senate Banking same day. The 2026-2027 setup: Powell on Board through term-end 2028 with Warsh in the Chair seat; the dissent posture compresses on rate calls because the Chair sets the framing; Powell's marginal vote becomes a governance signal whenever the Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome moves. Markets price a smaller forward-guidance volatility on rates but a larger institutional-risk premium on the Fed itself. The 1992-precedent comparison stops being a curiosity and starts being a structural reference point in financial-press explanations of the new Fed governance regime.
description.ja: **(非技術) Powell が 4/29 に Chair 任期終了 (5/15) 後も理事会に残る決定が 2026年金融政策市場心理を再構築 — 2026年 Q4 までに FOMC は Warsh Chair 体制下で反対票 ≤2 のより小さい反対規範に戻るが、Powell の理事会継続在任は金利ではなく Fed 調査ガバナンス問題のマージナルスイング票となる。** 4/29 は 1992年10月以来の最多反対 FOMC (8-4); Miran は -25bp を主張; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan は緩和バイアス含めることに反対。同日 Warsh 指名が上院銀行委員会を通過。2026-2027年セットアップ: Warsh が Chair 席で Powell が 2028年任期末まで理事会に在任; Chair がフレーミングを設定するため、利率コールでは反対姿勢が圧縮; トランプ政権 Fed 調査の結果が動くたびに Powell のマージナル票はガバナンスシグナルになる。市場は金利のフォワードガイダンスボラティリティを下げ、Fed 自体の制度リスクプレミアムを上げる方向に値付けする。1992年の前例比較は珍奇な話題ではなく、新しい Fed ガバナンス体制の金融プレス解説における構造的参照点になる。
description.es: **(No tecnológica) La decisión de Powell del 29-abr de permanecer en la Junta de Gobernadores tras vencer su mandato como Chair (15-may) reconfigura la psicología del mercado de política monetaria 2026 — para Q4 2026 el FOMC vuelve a una norma de menor disidencia (≤2 disidentes) bajo Warsh como Chair, pero la presencia continua de Powell en la Junta se convierte en el voto pivote marginal sobre la cuestión de gobernanza de la investigación Fed, no sobre los tipos.** El 29-abr fue el FOMC con más disidentes desde oct-1992 (8-4); Miran quería -25pb; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan se opusieron a incluir sesgo de relajación. La nominación de Warsh avanzó del Comité Bancario del Senado el mismo día. La configuración 2026-2027: Powell en la Junta hasta el final de su mandato en 2028 con Warsh en el sillón del Chair; la postura disidente se comprime en las decisiones de tipos porque el Chair fija el encuadre; el voto marginal de Powell se convierte en señal de gobernanza siempre que se mueva el resultado de la investigación Fed de Trump. Los mercados ponen precio a una menor volatilidad de forward guidance sobre tipos pero a una mayor prima de riesgo institucional sobre la propia Fed. La comparación con el precedente de 1992 deja de ser una curiosidad y pasa a ser un punto de referencia estructural en las explicaciones de la prensa financiera del nuevo régimen de gobernanza Fed.
description.fil: **(Non-tech) Binabago ng desisyon ni Powell noong Apr 29 na manatili sa Board of Governors lampas sa pagtatapos ng Chair-term niya (May 15) ang 2026 monetary-policy market psychology — bago matapos ang Q4 2026, babalik ang FOMC sa mas maliit na dissent norm (≤2 dissenters) sa ilalim ni Warsh bilang Chair, ngunit ang patuloy na presensya ni Powell sa Board ang magiging marginal swing vote sa Fed-investigation governance question, hindi sa rates.** Ang Apr 29 ang highest-dissent FOMC mula Oct-1992 (8-4); gusto ni Miran ang -25bp; tutol sina Hammack/Kashkari/Logan sa pagsasama ng easing-bias. Umusad ang nominasyon ni Warsh mula Senate Banking sa parehong araw. Ang 2026-2027 setup: Powell sa Board hanggang term-end 2028 habang nasa Chair seat si Warsh; mag-co-compress ang dissent posture sa rate calls dahil itinatakda ng Chair ang framing; ang marginal vote ni Powell ang magiging governance signal kapag may galaw sa Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome. Pe-presyuhan ng markets ang mas maliit na forward-guidance volatility sa rates ngunit mas malaki ang institutional-risk premium sa Fed mismo. Hihinto na ang 1992-precedent comparison sa pagiging curiosity at magiging structural reference point sa financial-press explanations ng bagong Fed governance regime.

The 1992-precedent comparison stops being a curiosity and starts being a structural reference point in financial-press explanations of the new Fed governance regime.

description.en: **Acceleration of the "local-first, cloud-overflow" inversion.** Qwen3.6-35B-A3B's 73.4% on SWE-bench Verified and Bonsai 1.7B's 674 tok/s on CUDA push edge implementations into practical territory. By Q3 2026, individual / SMB coding agents will standardize on "local by default, cloud as overflow."
description.ja: **「ローカル>クラウド」逆転の加速** — Qwen3.6-35B-A3B の 73.4% SWE-bench Verified、Bonsai 1.7B の CUDA 674 tok/s がエッジ実装の実用域に達したことで、2026 Q3 までに個人／SMB 向けコーディングエージェントは「ローカルを既定、クラウドはオーバーフロー」の構成が標準化する。

description.en: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package — no MoE routing complexity, runs on a single RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 — reaches flagship-grade coding ability. By Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma will each ship 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama-style models. The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. On-prem inference's default VRAM requirement shifts down from RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB to **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**.
description.ja: **「27B Dense + 1M context」が 2026 後半のエンタープライズ・ローカル LLM の事実上の標準ポジション** — Qwen3.6-27B の公開は、「MoE のルーティング複雑性なし・RTX 4090 1 枚で回る・1M context・Apache 2.0」という組み合わせがフラグシップ級コーディング能力に届くことを実証した。2026 Q3 までに Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma 系列がそれぞれ 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama 系ライセンスのモデルを投入し、70B+ MoE の差別化要素は「マルチモーダル理解」「ツール網羅」「長期推論」に限定される。オンプレ推論の既定 VRAM 要件は RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB から **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB** へ下方シフト。

nodes.label: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-2…
nodes.description: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. By Q3 2026, "native 1M context" becomes the floor for open weights, and existing 32K-128K models drop to legacy. RAG pipelines flip from "search → context-insert" to "dump everything in + dynamic prune," and vector DB vendors are pushed to redefine themselves as "long-context cache optimization layers."

short_label.ja: 1M context が既定」のオープン重み時代に 2026 Q3 以降完全移行

description.en: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. By Q3 2026, "native 1M context" becomes the floor for open weights, and existing 32K-128K models drop to legacy. RAG pipelines flip from "search → context-insert" to "dump everything in + dynamic prune," and vector DB vendors are pushed to redefine themselves as "long-context cache optimization layers."
description.ja: **「1M context が既定」のオープン重み時代に 2026 Q3 以降完全移行** — DeepSeek V4 の「1M context をボルトオンではなくゼロから設計」方針、Qwen3.6-27B の 262K→1M、Claude Opus 4.7 の 1M token context（Bedrock）、GPT-5.5 の長文脈強化は同じ方向。2026 Q3 までに「native 1M context」がオープン重みの最低ラインとなり、32K-128K 止まりの既存モデルはレガシー扱いに転落。RAG パイプラインは「検索→コンテキスト挿入」から「全データをそのまま投入＋動的プルーニング」方式に主流シフトし、ベクトル DB ベンダは「長 context キャッシュ最適化層」として再定義を迫られる。

nodes.label: **"Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" starts H2 2026.** With Siemens Erlangen's **HMND 01 Alpha** …
nodes.description: **"Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" starts H2 2026.** With Siemens Erlangen's **HMND 01 Alpha** (60 tote/h × 8h × 90%+), BMW Spartanburg's **Figure 02** (10 months / 30,000 vehicles / 90,000 parts), BMW Leipzig's **AEON** (Apr 2026 trial → summer pilot), and GXO's **Digit** (100K+ totes) all hit the same window — and Hannover Messe 2026 making Physical AI its first central theme — the industry's evaluation criterion is shifting from "vendor-claimed demos" to **"OEM-adopted production records."** In H2 2026 at **IROS (October)** and **GTC Fall 2026**, league tables for "OEM adoption count × continuous-operation hours × parts handled × MTBF" begin, with Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON's top five at the top. The 30+ companies still stuck in PoC phase get pushed into Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits.

short_label.ja: Physical AI 本番ライン稼働実績が IROS / GTC 2026…

description.en: **"Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" starts H2 2026.** With Siemens Erlangen's **HMND 01 Alpha** (60 tote/h × 8h × 90%+), BMW Spartanburg's **Figure 02** (10 months / 30,000 vehicles / 90,000 parts), BMW Leipzig's **AEON** (Apr 2026 trial → summer pilot), and GXO's **Digit** (100K+ totes) all hit the same window — and Hannover Messe 2026 making Physical AI its first central theme — the industry's evaluation criterion is shifting from "vendor-claimed demos" to **"OEM-adopted production records."** In H2 2026 at **IROS (October)** and **GTC Fall 2026**, league tables for "OEM adoption count × continuous-operation hours × parts handled × MTBF" begin, with Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON's top five at the top. The 30+ companies still stuck in PoC phase get pushed into Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits.
description.ja: **「Physical AI 本番ライン稼働実績が IROS / GTC 2026 でのリーグテーブル化」を 2026 後半に開始** — Siemens Erlangen の **HMND 01 Alpha**（60 tote/h × 8h × 90%+）、BMW Spartanburg の **Figure 02**（10 ヶ月 / 30,000 台 / 9 万部品）、BMW Leipzig の **AEON**（Apr 2026 テスト → 夏パイロット）、GXO の **Digit**（10 万 tote 超）が同期間に並列達成し、Hannover Messe 2026 で物理 AI が「初の中心テーマ」となった事実は、業界が **「ベンダ自称デモ」→「OEM 採用本番稼働実績」** の評価基準シフトを始めたことを示す。2026 H2 の **IROS（10 月）** および **GTC Fall 2026** で「OEM 採用社数 × 連続稼働時間 × 部品稼働数 × MTBF」のリーグテーブル化が始まり、Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON の 5 強がベンチマーク上位を占める一方、PoC 段階から脱せない 30+ 社が 2026 Q4 中に資金枯渇 / 買収 / 撤退に追い込まれる。

The 30+ companies still stuck in PoC phase get pushed into Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits.

short_label.ja: Headless Everything" アーキテクチャの標準化

description.en: **"Headless Everything" architecture standardizes.** Simon Willison's Apr 19 thesis — that personal AI is faster and more reliable hitting headless services than driving a GUI — frames an axis against browser-operating agents (Claude in Chrome, etc.). By H2 2026, expect a "headless-preferred" metadata standard on MCP / Agent Registry surfaces.
description.ja: **"Headless Everything" アーキテクチャの標準化** — Simon Willison が Apr 19 に提起した「Personal AI のために GUI ではなく headless が速い」という主張は、ブラウザ操作エージェント（Claude in Chrome など）との対立軸として広がる。2026 後半には MCP / Agent Registry 上に「headless 優先」メタデータが標準化される。

nodes.label: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferen…
nodes.description: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.

short_label.ja: 訓練 / 推論の SKU 分離」がカスタム AI シリコンの標準設計に

description.en: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.
description.ja: **「訓練 / 推論の SKU 分離」がカスタム AI シリコンの標準設計に** — Google TPU 8t / 8i の分割は、Trainium（訓練）/ Inferentia（推論）分離の延長線で **ハイパースケーラの自社チップが訓練・推論を別アーキテクチャに固定** する流れを決定づけた。2026 後半〜2027 前半には Microsoft MAIA、Meta MTIA もこの「二刀流」SKU 戦略を採用、NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin 系の「単一アーキで両対応」に対抗する構図が固定化。推論特化 SKU は FP4 / MXFP4 ネイティブを前提に **$/query の下方競争** が 2026 Q3 にピークを迎える。
description.es: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.

In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.

Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.

summary.es: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.

Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.

nodes.label: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative — Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-mar…
nodes.description: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative — Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.** With combined 2026 capex guidance from Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), and Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) totaling ~$650B-$700B against Wall Street's "AI ROI reality check," the Apr 29-30 prints either validate the **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis or trigger a multiple compression. By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve.

description.en: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative — Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.** With combined 2026 capex guidance from Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), and Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) totaling ~$650B-$700B against Wall Street's "AI ROI reality check," the Apr 29-30 prints either validate the **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis or trigger a multiple compression. By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve.
description.ja: **Mag 7 Q1 決算 (4/29-30) が AI capex の ROI ナラティブをリセット — Q3 2026 にハイパースケーラー初の「トークン マージン ゲート」による AI 設備投資階層化が公表される。** Alphabet (1,750〜1,850 億ドル)、Amazon (約 2,000 億ドル)、Meta (1,150〜1,350 億ドル)、Microsoft (Azure ラガード再評価リスク) の 2026 年合計 capex ガイダンスはおよそ 6,500〜7,000 億ドルに達し、ウォール街の「AI ROI 現実点検」と対峙する。4/29-30 の決算で **トークンあたり収益のエグジット ベロシティ** テーゼが検証されるか、マルチプル圧縮が引き起こされるかが分かれる。Q3 2026 までに Big-3 ハイパースケーラーのうち少なくとも 1 社が、Bedrock/Azure/Vertex の **トークン マージン下限** を増分 GPU 設備投資の条件として **公的に明示** する。これは公開クラウドからの最初の明示的「AI インフラ ROI 閾値」であり、2024-2025 の「投資せざるを得ない」教義の終焉を告げる。フロンティア ラボのアンカーディール (Google 400 億 / Anthropic、Amazon 250 億 / Anthropic、OpenAI 200 億 / Cerebras + Microsoft) は可視的な圧力リリースバルブとなる。
description.es: **Los resultados Q1 de las Mag 7 (29-30/04) reescriben la narrativa del ROI del capex en IA — el Q3 2026 verá al primer hyperscaler que escalonará públicamente el capex de IA por una compuerta de margen por token.** Con la guía combinada de capex 2026 de Alphabet (175.000-185.000 M USD), Amazon (~200.000 M USD), Meta (115.000-135.000 M USD) y Microsoft (con riesgo de re-rating por rezago de Azure) totalizando ~650.000-700.000 M USD frente al "control de realidad del ROI de la IA" de Wall Street, los resultados del 29-30/04 validarán la tesis de **velocidad de escape de ingreso por token** o desencadenarán una compresión de múltiplos. Para el Q3 2026, al menos un hyperscaler de los Big-3 **condicionará públicamente el capex incremental en GPU a un piso de margen por token en Bedrock/Azure/Vertex** — el primer "umbral de ROI de infraestructura de IA" explícito desde una nube pública, poniendo fin a la doctrina 2024-2025 de "gasta o muere". Los acuerdos ancla de los frontier labs (Google 40.000 M / Anthropic, Amazon 25.000 M / Anthropic, OpenAI 20.000 M / Cerebras + Microsoft) pasan a ser la válvula visible de alivio.
description.fil: **I-reset ng Mag 7 Q1 earnings (4/29-30) ang AI-capex ROI narrative — sa Q3 2026, may unang hyperscaler na publikong magta-tier ng AI capex sa pamamagitan ng token-margin gate.** Sa pinagsamang 2026 capex guidance mula sa Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), at Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) na umaabot ng ~$650B-$700B kontra sa "AI ROI reality check" ng Wall Street, ang 4/29-30 prints ay maaaring magpatibay sa thesis ng **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** o magtigger ng multiple compression. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang publikong **mag-gagate ng incremental GPU capex sa isang Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — ito ang unang explicit na "AI infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud, na magtatapos sa 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Ang frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) ang magiging visible pressure relief valve.

Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve.

nodes.label: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Mi…
nodes.short_label: Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the…
nodes.description: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal anchor the new doctrine.** Combined Mag 7 capex of ~$700B for 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending to ~$170B FY27) lands into a tape that has already shifted from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." **Apr 27 contract restructurings explicitly route AI-lab compute through hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton with Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs at scale). By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does.

description.en: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal anchor the new doctrine.** Combined Mag 7 capex of ~$700B for 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending to ~$170B FY27) lands into a tape that has already shifted from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." **Apr 27 contract restructurings explicitly route AI-lab compute through hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton with Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs at scale). By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does.
description.ja: **Mag 7 決算 + FOMC(4/28-29)が、ハイパースケーラーによる初の**トークンあたりマージンゲート型設備投資**開示を2026年Q3までに引き出す — 4/27 OpenAI / Microsoft 協定 + Anthropic / AWS Trainium シリコンレベル契約が新ドクトリンを支える。** 2026年のMag 7合計設備投資 約$700B(Alphabet $175B-$185B、Amazon 約$200B、Meta $115B-$135B、Microsoft FY26 約$146BでFY27は$170Bへ)は、すでに「設備投資を信用で評価する」段階から「実利を要求する」段階へ移行した相場に着地する。**4/27の契約再構築はAIラボの計算需要をハイパースケーラー所有のシリコンへ明示的にルーティング**(AWS Trainium / Graviton with Anthropic; Meta Graviton CPU を大規模に)。2026年Q3までに、Big-3ハイパースケーラーの少なくとも1社が**Bedrock / Azure / Vertex のトークンあたりマージン下限に基づき増分GPU設備投資をゲート化**する公的開示を行う — 公開クラウドからの初の「AIインフラROIスレッショルド」。NVDA $5T級時価総額とAMD / Cerebras IPOの軌道は維持される; 支出曲線は折れないが、その開示言語は変わる。
description.es: **Los reportes de Mag 7 + FOMC 28-29 abr fuerzan la primera divulgación de **capex con compuerta de margen-por-token** de un hyperscaler para Q3 2026 — el pacto OpenAI/Microsoft del 27 abr + el acuerdo Anthropic/AWS Trainium a nivel de silicio anclan la nueva doctrina.** El capex Mag 7 combinado de ~$700B para 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 tendiendo a ~$170B FY27) aterriza en una cinta que ya ha cambiado de "premiar el capex por fe" a "exigir beneficio tangible". **Las reestructuraciones contractuales del 27 abr enrutan explícitamente el cómputo de los laboratorios IA a través de silicio propiedad del hyperscaler** (AWS Trainium/Graviton con Anthropic; CPUs Meta-Graviton a escala). Para Q3 2026 al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 públicamente **acota el capex GPU incremental sobre un piso de margen-por-token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex** — primer "umbral ROI de AI-infra" explícito desde una nube pública. La capitalización clase $5T de NVDA y la trayectoria de IPO de AMD/Cerebras se mantienen; la curva de gasto no se rompe, pero su lenguaje de divulgación sí.
description.fil: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 ang magpipilit sa unang **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure mula sa hyperscaler pagdating ng Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal ang mga anchor ng bagong doctrine.** Ang pinagsamang Mag 7 capex na ~$700B para sa 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 nagpapatungo sa ~$170B FY27) ay babagsak sa isang tape na lumipat na mula "rewarding capex on faith" patungong "demanding tangible profit." **Tahasang nirou-route ng Apr 27 contract restructurings ang AI-lab compute sa hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton sa Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs sa scale). Pagdating ng Q3 2026, may isang Big-3 hyperscaler na publicly **nagga-gate ng incremental GPU capex sa Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — unang explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud. Mananatili ang NVDA $5T-class market cap at ang AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory; hindi mababasag ang spend curve, pero magbabago ang disclosure language nito.

By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does.

nodes.description: **(Tech) By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.

description.en: **(Tech) By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.
description.ja: **(技術) 2026年 H2 までに、すべての主要ローカル LLM エコシステム (vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM、Foundry Local) が統一された圧縮 KV キャッシュデプロイメントノブ — TurboQuant + 少なくとも 1つの代替 — を公開し、Foundry Local (Microsoft、4/9 GA) が Windows ML / WinML 実行プロバイダーに紐づく Windows デフォルト最適化として TurboQuant ネイティブ統合を出荷する。** 4/27-29 のエビデンス: SGLang PR #21419 がツリーイン; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode カーネル書き直しが bf16 比 93–105% スループットに到達; vLLM v0.19.0 (4/2) が torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / 非同期スケジューラデフォルト + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971、4/27) はマルチエージェント推論のための共有非対称 KV プール; NVIDIA kvpress は Decoding-Press 成熟段階; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant ディスカッションスレッドはアクティブ; Unsloth 2026.4.8 推論 20-30% 高速化。Foundry Local は欠落していたエンタープライズ Windows エントリポイント — Microsoft はハードウェア対応 WinML 実行プロバイダーで任意のアプリにローカル AI をバンドルする約 20MB のネイティブライブラリとして出荷しており、2026年 Q2 の自明な次の一歩は Foundry Catalog で TurboQuant フラグを公開することだ。経済的強制関数は同じ Mag 7 設備投資テープ: メモリ帯域制約のロングコンテキストワークロードが FP16 から 3.5ビットに移ると、トークンあたりの実効コストは ~5-6倍下がり、Foundry Local はそのスイッチをエンドデベロッパーから不可視にする。
description.es: **(Tecnológica) Para H2 2026 cada gran ecosistema de LLM local (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) expone un selector unificado de despliegue de KV-cache comprimida — TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa — y Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA 9-abr) integra TurboQuant nativo ligado a los proveedores de ejecución Windows ML / WinML como optimización por defecto en Windows.** Evidencia 27-29 abr: SGLang PR #21419 ya en árbol; reescritura de kernel fused-Triton-decode SGLang #23134 alcanzando 93–105% de throughput vs bf16; vLLM v0.19.0 (2-abr) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / scheduler asíncrono por defecto + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, 27-abr) pool KV asimétrico compartido para inferencia multi-agente; NVIDIA kvpress en madurez Decoding-Press; hilo de discusión llama.cpp #20969 sobre TurboQuant activo; Unsloth 2026.4.8 con inferencia 20-30% más rápida. Foundry Local es el punto de entrada empresarial Windows que faltaba — Microsoft lo distribuye como una librería nativa de ~20MB que empaqueta IA local en cualquier app con proveedores de ejecución WinML adaptados al hardware, y el siguiente paso obvio para Q2 2026 es exponer un flag TurboQuant en el Foundry Catalog. La función forzada económica es la misma cinta de capex Mag 7: cada carga de trabajo de contexto largo limitada por ancho de banda de memoria que pase de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el coste efectivo por token ~5-6x, y Foundry Local hace ese cambio invisible para los desarrolladores.
description.fil: **(Tech) Bago matapos ang H2 2026, ipo-publish ng bawat major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) ang unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + hindi bababa sa isang alternative — at magsi-ship ang Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ng native TurboQuant integration na nakatali sa Windows ML / WinML execution providers bilang Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419; umaabot sa 93–105% bf16 throughput ang SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool para sa multi-agent inference; Decoding-Press maturity ang NVIDIA kvpress; aktibo ang llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread; 20-30% mas mabilis ang inference ng Unsloth 2026.4.8. Ang Foundry Local ang nawawalang enterprise-Windows entry point — ini-ship ito ng Microsoft bilang ~20MB native library na nag-bubundle ng local AI sa anumang app na may hardware-matched WinML execution providers, at ang halatang susunod na hakbang para sa Q2 2026 ay i-surface ang TurboQuant flag sa Foundry Catalog. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag 7 capex tape: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na lilipat mula FP16 patungong 3.5-bit ay magpaputol sa effective per-token cost ng ~5-6x, at ginagawang invisible ng Foundry Local ang switch na iyon sa end-developers.

summary.en: **(Tech) By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.
summary.ja: **(技術) 2026年 H2 までに、すべての主要ローカル LLM エコシステム (vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM、Foundry Local) が統一された圧縮 KV キャッシュデプロイメントノブ — TurboQuant + 少なくとも 1つの代替 — を公開し、Foundry Local (Microsoft、4/9 GA) が Windows ML / WinML 実行プロバイダーに紐づく Windows デフォルト最適化として TurboQuant ネイティブ統合を出荷する。** 4/27-29 のエビデンス: SGLang PR #21419 がツリーイン; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode カーネル書き直しが bf16 比 93–105% スループットに到達; vLLM v0.19.0 (4/2) が torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / 非同期スケジューラデフォルト + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971、4/27) はマルチエージェント推論のための共有非対称 KV プール; NVIDIA kvpress は Decoding-Press 成熟段階; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant ディスカッションスレッドはアクティブ; Unsloth 2026.4.8 推論 20-30% 高速化。Foundry Local は欠落していたエンタープライズ Windows エントリポイント — Microsoft はハードウェア対応 WinML 実行プロバイダーで任意のアプリにローカル AI をバンドルする約 20MB のネイティブライブラリとして出荷しており、2026年 Q2 の自明な次の一歩は Foundry Catalog で TurboQuant フラグを公開することだ。経済的強制関数は同じ Mag 7 設備投資テープ: メモリ帯域制約のロングコンテキストワークロードが FP16 から 3.5ビットに移ると、トークンあたりの実効コストは ~5-6倍下がり、Foundry Local はそのスイッチをエンドデベロッパーから不可視にする。
summary.es: **(Tecnológica) Para H2 2026 cada gran ecosistema de LLM local (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) expone un selector unificado de despliegue de KV-cache comprimida — TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa — y Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA 9-abr) integra TurboQuant nativo ligado a los proveedores de ejecución Windows ML / WinML como optimización por defecto en Windows.** Evidencia 27-29 abr: SGLang PR #21419 ya en árbol; reescritura de kernel fused-Triton-decode SGLang #23134 alcanzando 93–105% de throughput vs bf16; vLLM v0.19.0 (2-abr) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / scheduler asíncrono por defecto + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, 27-abr) pool KV asimétrico compartido para inferencia multi-agente; NVIDIA kvpress en madurez Decoding-Press; hilo de discusión llama.cpp #20969 sobre TurboQuant activo; Unsloth 2026.4.8 con inferencia 20-30% más rápida. Foundry Local es el punto de entrada empresarial Windows que faltaba — Microsoft lo distribuye como una librería nativa de ~20MB que empaqueta IA local en cualquier app con proveedores de ejecución WinML adaptados al hardware, y el siguiente paso obvio para Q2 2026 es exponer un flag TurboQuant en el Foundry Catalog. La función forzada económica es la misma cinta de capex Mag 7: cada carga de trabajo de contexto largo limitada por ancho de banda de memoria que pase de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el coste efectivo por token ~5-6x, y Foundry Local hace ese cambio invisible para los desarrolladores.

nodes.label: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, b…
nodes.description: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact.

description.en: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact.
description.ja: **「コンシューマ GPU 上のコーディングエージェント」が Q3 2026 までに開発ワークロードの 30% 以上でクラウドオンリー API を置き換える。** 4/22 の Qwen3.6-27B (Dense、SWE-bench Verified で 397B-A17B を撃破、**RTX 3090 + Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB で 40 tok/s**) + 4/23 の Ollama MLX プレビュー (M5 Max + Qwen3.5-35B-A3B で prefill 1.57 倍 / decode 1.93 倍) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75% オフ API (**Claude Opus 4.7 比で実効 ~28 倍安価**) が独自フロンティア API SaaS モデルへの **3 方向の挟撃**を構成。Q3 2026 までに **エンタープライズ開発ツールはハイブリッドハーネスがデフォルト** — 「コーディング、リファクタリング、Lint、テスト」はローカル Qwen 3.6 クラス、「長期計画 / マルチツール推論」のみリモート フロンティア API — が標準化。Big-3 IDE (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) はすべて **ローカルファースト切替** をデフォルトで搭載。「クラウドオンリー コーディングエージェント」は 2024 年遺物となる。
description.es: **El "agente de coding sobre GPU de consumo" desplaza a la API de coding solo-cloud en ≥30 % de las cargas dev para el T3 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B del 22/4 (denso, supera al 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s en RTX 3090 con Q4_K_M ~16,8 GB**) + el preview MLX de Ollama del 23/4 (1,57x prefill / 1,93x decode en M5 Max sobre Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + la API DeepSeek V4-Pro 75 % off (**efectivamente ~28x más barata que Claude Opus 4.7**) componen un **acoso a tres bandas** sobre el modelo SaaS de API frontera propietaria. Para el T3 2026, **las herramientas dev empresariales adoptan por defecto un harness híbrido** — Qwen 3.6 local para "coding, refactor, lint, test" + API frontera remota solo para "planificación de horizonte largo / razonamiento multi-tool" — y los Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) traen un **conmutador local-first** activado por defecto. El "agente de coding solo-cloud" queda como reliquia de 2024.
description.fil: **Papalitan ng "consumer-GPU coding agent" ang cloud-only coding API sa ≥30% ng dev workloads pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 22 Qwen3.6-27B (dense, nakahihigit sa 397B-A17B sa SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s sa RTX 3090 sa Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode sa M5 Max para sa Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x mas mura kaysa Claude Opus 4.7**) ay bumubuo ng **3-corner squeeze** sa proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **gagamit ang enterprise dev tools ng hybrid harness bilang default** — local Qwen 3.6-class para sa "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API lamang para sa "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — at lahat ng Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ay maglalabas ng **local-first toggle** bilang default. Magiging 2024-era artifact na lang ang "cloud-only coding agent".

summary.en: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact.
summary.ja: **「コンシューマ GPU 上のコーディングエージェント」が Q3 2026 までに開発ワークロードの 30% 以上でクラウドオンリー API を置き換える。** 4/22 の Qwen3.6-27B (Dense、SWE-bench Verified で 397B-A17B を撃破、**RTX 3090 + Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB で 40 tok/s**) + 4/23 の Ollama MLX プレビュー (M5 Max + Qwen3.5-35B-A3B で prefill 1.57 倍 / decode 1.93 倍) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75% オフ API (**Claude Opus 4.7 比で実効 ~28 倍安価**) が独自フロンティア API SaaS モデルへの **3 方向の挟撃**を構成。Q3 2026 までに **エンタープライズ開発ツールはハイブリッドハーネスがデフォルト** — 「コーディング、リファクタリング、Lint、テスト」はローカル Qwen 3.6 クラス、「長期計画 / マルチツール推論」のみリモート フロンティア API — が標準化。Big-3 IDE (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) はすべて **ローカルファースト切替** をデフォルトで搭載。「クラウドオンリー コーディングエージェント」は 2024 年遺物となる。
summary.es: **El "agente de coding sobre GPU de consumo" desplaza a la API de coding solo-cloud en ≥30 % de las cargas dev para el T3 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B del 22/4 (denso, supera al 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s en RTX 3090 con Q4_K_M ~16,8 GB**) + el preview MLX de Ollama del 23/4 (1,57x prefill / 1,93x decode en M5 Max sobre Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + la API DeepSeek V4-Pro 75 % off (**efectivamente ~28x más barata que Claude Opus 4.7**) componen un **acoso a tres bandas** sobre el modelo SaaS de API frontera propietaria. Para el T3 2026, **las herramientas dev empresariales adoptan por defecto un harness híbrido** — Qwen 3.6 local para "coding, refactor, lint, test" + API frontera remota solo para "planificación de horizonte largo / razonamiento multi-tool" — y los Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) traen un **conmutador local-first** activado por defecto. El "agente de coding solo-cloud" queda como reliquia de 2024.
summary.fil: **Papalitan ng "consumer-GPU coding agent" ang cloud-only coding API sa ≥30% ng dev workloads pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 22 Qwen3.6-27B (dense, nakahihigit sa 397B-A17B sa SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s sa RTX 3090 sa Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode sa M5 Max para sa Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x mas mura kaysa Claude Opus 4.7**) ay bumubuo ng **3-corner squeeze** sa proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **gagamit ang enterprise dev tools ng hybrid harness bilang default** — local Qwen 3.6-class para sa "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API lamang para sa "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — at lahat ng Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ay maglalabas ng **local-first toggle** bilang default. Magiging 2024-era artifact na lang ang "cloud-only coding agent".

nodes.label: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + age…
nodes.description: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3.
