short_label.ja: AI インフラ CVE クラス」が規制プリミティブへ昇格
short_label.es: La "clase CVE de infraestructura de IA"…

description.en: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3.
description.ja: **「AI インフラ CVE クラス」が規制プリミティブへ昇格 — Q4 2026 に CISA / NIST が KEV から独立した「推論サーバ + エージェンティック CI ランタイム」サブカタログを公開。** 4/19-27 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (依然未パッチ)** + **Pillar の Antigravity サンドボックス エスケープ (`find_by_name -X` 経由)** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE (CI/CD 基盤依存)** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control プロンプト インジェクション チェーン (Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot)** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 サンドボックス バイパス** — はもはや「カテゴリ形成中」ではない。NIST の 4 月オペレーション更新 (CVE 公開数の記録的増加、AI 駆動評価サポート) と Google の **野生 IPI コンテンツ前年比 32% 増** を受けて、CISA/NVD が Q4 2026 までに **専用の「推論サーバ + エージェンティック ツール」CVE サブカタログ** を SBOM タグ付け必須でリリース。OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をトップ 3 に格上げ。
description.es: **La "clase CVE de infraestructura de IA" se gradúa como primitiva regulatoria — el Q4 2026 verá a CISA / NIST publicar un subcatálogo para runtimes de servidores de inferencia + CI agente, separado del KEV.** La secuencia 19-27/04 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (sigue sin parche)** + **escape de sandbox en Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + **CVE-2026-6951 RCE en simple-git, dependencia fundacional de CI/CD** + **cadena de inyección Comment-and-Control del 21/04 en Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **bypass de sandbox en OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329** — ya no es una "categoría emergente". La actualización de operaciones de NIST de abril (crecimiento récord de publicación de CVE, soporte de evaluación basado en IA) más el **aumento del 32% interanual de inyecciones indirectas en la wild de Google** obligan a CISA/NVD a entregar un **subcatálogo CVE dedicado a servidores de inferencia + herramientas agente** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio para el Q4 2026. El OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" al top 3.
description.fil: **Mag-graduate ang "AI-Infra CVE class" papuntang regulatory primitive — sa Q4 2026, mag-publish ang CISA / NIST ng sub-catalog para sa inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, hiwalay sa KEV.** Ang sequence ng 4/19-27 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (hindi pa rin na-patch)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa foundational CI/CD dep** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — hindi na "category emerging." Ang April ops update ng NIST (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus ang **32% YoY na pagtaas ng indirect-prompt-injection sa wild ng Google** ang magpipilit sa CISA/NVD na mag-ship ng **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging pagdating ng Q4 2026. I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" papuntang top-3.

summary.en: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「AI インフラ CVE クラス」が規制プリミティブへ昇格 — Q4 2026 に CISA / NIST が KEV から独立した「推論サーバ + エージェンティック CI ランタイム」サブカタログを公開。** 4/19-27 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (依然未パッチ)** + **Pillar の Antigravity サンドボックス エスケープ (`find_by_name -X` 経由)** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE (CI/CD 基盤依存)** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control プロンプト インジェクション チェーン (Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot)** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 サンドボックス バイパス** — はもはや「カテゴリ形成中」ではない。NIST の 4 月オペレーション更新 (CVE 公開数の記録的増加、AI 駆動評価サポート) と Google の **野生 IPI コンテンツ前年比 32% 増** を受けて、CISA/NVD が Q4 2026 までに **専用の「推論サーバ + エージェンティック ツール」CVE サブカタログ** を SBOM タグ付け必須でリリース。OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をトップ 3 に格上げ。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **La "clase CVE de infraestructura de IA" se gradúa como primitiva regulatoria — el Q4 2026 verá a CISA / NIST publicar un subcatálogo para runtimes de servidores de inferencia + CI agente, separado del KEV.** La secuencia 19-27/04 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (sigue sin parche)** + **escape de sandbox en Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + **CVE-2026-6951 RCE en simple-git, dependencia fundacional de CI/CD** + **cadena de inyección Comment-and-Control del 21/04 en Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **bypass de sandbox en OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329** — ya no es una "categoría emergente". La actualización de operaciones de NIST de abril (crecimiento récord de publicación de CVE, soporte de evaluación basado en IA) más el **aumento del 32% interanual de inyecciones indirectas en la wild de Google** obligan a CISA/NVD a entregar un **subcatálogo CVE dedicado a servidores de inferencia + herramientas agente** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio para el Q4 2026. El OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" al top 3.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Mag-graduate ang "AI-Infra CVE class" papuntang regulatory primitive — sa Q4 2026, mag-publish ang CISA / NIST ng sub-catalog para sa inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, hiwalay sa KEV.** Ang sequence ng 4/19-27 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (hindi pa rin na-patch)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa foundational CI/CD dep** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — hindi na "category emerging." Ang April ops update ng NIST (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus ang **32% YoY na pagtaas ng indirect-prompt-injection sa wild ng Google** ang magpipilit sa CISA/NVD na mag-ship ng **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging pagdating ng Q4 2026. I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" papuntang top-3.

description.en: **Convergence on an "Agent Registry" model.** AWS Agent Registry, NemoClaw's audit-log + guardrail story, and Hermes Agent's self-learned skills all surface in the same window. By H2 2026, a registry standard for distributing agent artifacts (skills, tool permissions, audit traces) will grow alongside MCP.

nodes.label: **The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab"** is here. Amazon-Anthropic's 10-year $100B commit becomes the second…
nodes.description: **The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab"** is here. Amazon-Anthropic's 10-year $100B commit becomes the second "hardware-codesigned + platform-exclusive" contract after MS-OpenAI. Through H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect the **5-pole regime** — Google–(in-house Gemini), Anthropic–AWS, OpenAI–MS, Meta–internal (Llama), xAI–Oracle/NVDA — to lock in. Trainium / TPU / MAIA / MI300X design differences will translate directly into model-behavior differences, and developers will reassess **backend portability** (a runtime-agnostic layer like MCP) as a hard requirement.

short_label.ja: ハイパースケーラ × フロンティアラボの排他同盟」時代

description.en: **The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab"** is here. Amazon-Anthropic's 10-year $100B commit becomes the second "hardware-codesigned + platform-exclusive" contract after MS-OpenAI. Through H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect the **5-pole regime** — Google–(in-house Gemini), Anthropic–AWS, OpenAI–MS, Meta–internal (Llama), xAI–Oracle/NVDA — to lock in. Trainium / TPU / MAIA / MI300X design differences will translate directly into model-behavior differences, and developers will reassess **backend portability** (a runtime-agnostic layer like MCP) as a hard requirement.
description.ja: **「ハイパースケーラ × フロンティアラボの排他同盟」時代** — Amazon–Anthropic の 10 年 $100B コミットは、MS–OpenAI 提携に続く二つ目の「ハードウェア専用設計 × プラットフォーム独占」契約となる。2026 後半〜2027 前半で Google–（内製 Gemini）, Anthropic–AWS, OpenAI–MS, Meta–社内（Llama）, xAI–Oracle/NVDA の**5極体制**が固定化する。Trainium / TPU / MAIA / MI300X の設計差が「モデルの挙動差」に直結し、開発者は**バックエンドポータビリティ**（MCP のようなランタイム非依存層）を必須要件として再評価する。

nodes.label: **Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Neura × AWS, DEEPX × Hyundai, and the run of NVIDIA Isaac GR00T /…
nodes.short_label: Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-…
nodes.description: **Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Neura × AWS, DEEPX × Hyundai, and the run of NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships all point the same way: **the training pipeline for robot-control models is consolidating in the cloud.** By Q3 2026, per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) become a standard line item in enterprise contracts. The robot itself commoditizes as a "moving compute endpoint," and manufacturers shift to **fleet-management software with recurring revenue.**

description.en: **Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Neura × AWS, DEEPX × Hyundai, and the run of NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships all point the same way: **the training pipeline for robot-control models is consolidating in the cloud.** By Q3 2026, per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) become a standard line item in enterprise contracts. The robot itself commoditizes as a "moving compute endpoint," and manufacturers shift to **fleet-management software with recurring revenue.**
description.ja: **Physical AI の SaaS 化と「Robot-as-a-Service」基盤競争** — Neura × AWS、DEEPX × Hyundai、NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos の相次ぐ提携は、**ロボット制御モデルの訓練パイプラインがクラウド側に集約** される方向性を示す。2026 Q3 にはロボット 1 台あたりのクラウド計算課金（訓練 + 同期シミュ + ポリシ更新）がエンタープライズ契約の既定項目となり、ロボット本体は「動くコンピュート終端」として商品コモディティ化、メーカは **フリート管理ソフトウェアの経常収益** へシフトする。

description.en: **OAuth trust between AI SaaS becomes the top enterprise risk.** The Vercel-Context.ai case shows how an employee's personal AI Office SaaS connection can turn into the breach path for the company's whole Google Workspace. By Q3 2026, major SSO providers (Okta / Entra ID / Google Workspace) will **carve out an "AI extension" OAuth scope category**, letting administrators block "Allow All" defaults wholesale. CASB / SSPM vendors will report "data volume read by AI integrations" as an independent metric.
description.ja: **AI SaaS 間の OAuth 横断信任が最大のエンタープライズリスクに** — Vercel–Context.ai 事例は、社員が個人で連携した AI Office SaaS が企業の Google Workspace 全体を侵害経路に変えることを示した。2026 Q3 までに、主要 SSO プロバイダ（Okta / Entra ID / Google Workspace）は **AI SaaS 向け OAuth スコープを "AI 拡張" カテゴリとして分離**、管理者が「Allow All」既定を一括ブロックできる制御を標準化する。CASB / SSPM ベンダーも「AI 連携が閲覧する企業データ量」を独立メトリクスとしてレポート化する。

nodes.label: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedroc…
nodes.short_label: The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the n…
nodes.description: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's new Managed Harness / CLI / skills, and OpenAI's Workspace Agents all converge on the same strategy: **bind the agent lifecycle, audit, and governance into a single control plane.** By Q3 2026, Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSO layers will treat agent identifiers as first-class objects alongside humans and service accounts. CASB / SSPM vendors will measure "API calls touched by AI agents" with a separate SLO / risk score from human-user baselines.

description.en: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's new Managed Harness / CLI / skills, and OpenAI's Workspace Agents all converge on the same strategy: **bind the agent lifecycle, audit, and governance into a single control plane.** By Q3 2026, Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSO layers will treat agent identifiers as first-class objects alongside humans and service accounts. CASB / SSPM vendors will measure "API calls touched by AI agents" with a separate SLO / risk score from human-user baselines.
description.ja: **「Agent Control Plane」がハイパースケーラ競争の新主戦場に** — Google の Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform、AWS Bedrock AgentCore の新 Managed Harness / CLI / skills、OpenAI の Workspace Agents は、いずれも「エージェントのライフサイクル管理・監査・ガバナンス」を単一コントロールプレーンに束ねる同一方向の戦略。2026 Q3 までに、Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace の SSO レイヤはエージェント識別子を人間 / サービスアカウントと同等の第一級オブジェクトとして扱い、CASB / SSPM ベンダは「AI エージェントが触れる API 呼び出し量」を人間ユーザ基準とは別の SLO / リスクスコアで計測する標準に移行する。

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「Agent Control Plane」がハイパースケーラ競争の新主戦場に** — Google の Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform、AWS Bedrock AgentCore の新 Managed Harness / CLI / skills、OpenAI の Workspace Agents は、いずれも「エージェントのライフサイクル管理・監査・ガバナンス」を単一コントロールプレーンに束ねる同一方向の戦略。2026 Q3 までに、Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace の SSO レイヤはエージェント識別子を人間 / サービスアカウントと同等の第一級オブジェクトとして扱い、CASB / SSPM ベンダは「AI エージェントが触れる API 呼び出し量」を人間ユーザ基準とは別の SLO / リスクスコアで計測する標準に移行する。

description.en: **The "frontier AI lab × Tier-1 cloud capacity capture" splits the field cleanly by Q3 2026.** With Google Cloud confirming three deals in a single month — Anthropic (GB300 + large TPU), Meta (GB300 capacity), Thinking Machines Lab (A4X Max) — the structure crystallizes: clouds with enough capacity for frontier model development narrow to three (AWS / Azure / GCP). Amazon counters with **another $25B + 5GW Trainium2/3 capacity + 10-year $100B commit** for Anthropic; Azure holds OpenAI / Mistral / Inflection; GCP adds Anthropic / TML / Meta. By Q3 2026, "fourth-hyperscaler candidates without their own cloud or long-term capacity contracts with frontier labs" (Oracle Cloud / IBM / Coreweave) shift fully to **"unable to train frontier-scale, specialize on inference."** AI silicon ecosystems lock into a two-tier shape: training capacity = three-cloud oligopoly / inference = layered.
description.ja: **「フロンティア AI ラボ × Tier-1 クラウドの容量囲い込み」が 2026 Q3 までに完全分割線として確定** — Google Cloud 単月で Anthropic（GB300 + TPU 大型契約）、Meta（GB300 容量）、Thinking Machines Lab（A4X Max）の 3 件を確定させた事実は、「フロンティアモデル開発に十分な容量を持つクラウドは 3 社（AWS / Azure / GCP）に絞られる」構造の固定化を意味する。Amazon が Anthropic に **追加 $25B + 5GW Trainium2/3 容量 + 10 年 $100B コミット** で対抗、Azure は OpenAI / Mistral / Inflection 系を握り、GCP は Anthropic / TML / Meta を加える。2026 Q3 までに「自社クラウドを持たない / フロンティアラボとの長期容量契約を持たない第 4 のハイパースケーラ候補」（Oracle Cloud / IBM / Coreweave など）は **「フロンティア訓練不可能だが推論最適化に特化」** へ位置付けが完全シフトし、AI チップ生態系は「訓練容量 = 3 社寡占 / 推論 = 多層化」の二層構造に固まる。

nodes.label: **"Hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" graduates from finance pact to compute-stack lock-in by Q3 2026.** Apr 24's Google **$40B + 5GW** to…
nodes.description: **"Hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" graduates from finance pact to compute-stack lock-in by Q3 2026.** Apr 24's Google **$40B + 5GW** to Anthropic + the prior Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft's existing $13B+ to OpenAI mean the **top 3 frontier labs each have a hyperscaler underwriter — paid partly in compute capacity, not cash**. By Q3 2026, **frontier-model serving topology becomes dictated by funding origin**: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 ships natively on Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 stays Azure-first, and Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) double down on Huawei Ascend (per the Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). The "model-portability promise" of 2024-2025 quietly ends; **enterprise multi-cloud LLM strategy shifts from "multi-runtime" to "multi-frontier-vendor."**

short_label.ja: ハイパースケーラー × AI ラボの資本結合」が金融的盟約から計算スタックの囲…

description.en: **"Hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" graduates from finance pact to compute-stack lock-in by Q3 2026.** Apr 24's Google **$40B + 5GW** to Anthropic + the prior Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft's existing $13B+ to OpenAI mean the **top 3 frontier labs each have a hyperscaler underwriter — paid partly in compute capacity, not cash**. By Q3 2026, **frontier-model serving topology becomes dictated by funding origin**: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 ships natively on Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 stays Azure-first, and Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) double down on Huawei Ascend (per the Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). The "model-portability promise" of 2024-2025 quietly ends; **enterprise multi-cloud LLM strategy shifts from "multi-runtime" to "multi-frontier-vendor."**
description.ja: **「ハイパースケーラー × AI ラボの資本結合」が金融的盟約から計算スタックの囲い込みへ移行、Q3 2026 に完成する。** 4/24 の Google **400 億ドル + 5GW** Anthropic 投資 + 直前の Amazon **250 億ドル + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft の既存 130 億ドル超 OpenAI 投資により、**フロンティア 3 ラボそれぞれに専属ハイパースケーラーが付き、しかも支払いの一部は計算キャパシティで決済される**構造が確立。Q3 2026 までに、**フロンティアモデルのサービング配置は資金提供元によって規定される**ようになる。Anthropic の Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 は Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google 経路) でネイティブ提供、OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 は Azure ファースト維持、中国系フロンティア (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) は Huawei Ascend にさらに傾斜 (4/26 Bloomberg-CCTV 記事の通り)。2024-2025 の「モデル可搬性の約束」は静かに終わり、**エンタープライズのマルチクラウド LLM 戦略は「マルチランタイム」から「マルチフロンティアベンダー」へ転換する**。
description.es: **El "acoplamiento de capital hyperscaler-laboratorio AI" deja de ser pacto financiero para convertirse en bloqueo de la pila de cómputo durante el T3 2026.** El compromiso del 24/4 de Google **40.000 M$ + 5 GW** a Anthropic + el previo Amazon **25.000 M$ + 5 GW de Trainium2/3** + los más de 13.000 M$ históricos de Microsoft a OpenAI suponen que **los tres laboratorios frontera tienen un padrino hyperscaler — pagado en parte con capacidad de cómputo, no en metálico**. Para el T3 2026, **la topología de servicio de modelos frontera quedará dictada por el origen de la financiación**: Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nativo en Trainium2 + TPU v8 (vías Amazon + Google), GPT-5.5 / 6 sigue Azure-first y los laboratorios chinos (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) doblan apuesta por Huawei Ascend (según el artículo Bloomberg-CCTV del 26/4). La "promesa de portabilidad de modelos" de 2024-2025 se apaga; **la estrategia LLM multi-cloud de la empresa pasa de "multi-runtime" a "multi-vendor frontera"**.
description.fil: **Magmamadali ang "hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" mula sa finance pact tungo sa compute-stack lock-in pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 24 Google **$40B + 5GW** sa Anthropic + ang naunang Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + ang umiiral na $13B+ ng Microsoft sa OpenAI ay nangangahulugang **bawat isa sa tatlong frontier labs ay may hyperscaler underwriter — bahagyang binabayaran sa pamamagitan ng compute capacity, hindi cash**. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **ang serving topology ng frontier models ay didiktahan ng pinanggalingan ng pondo**: Mag-ship ang Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nang native sa Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), magiging Azure-first pa rin ang OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6, at lalong magpopokus ang Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) sa Huawei Ascend (gaya ng nasa Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). Tahimik na matatapos ang "model-portability promise" ng 2024-2025; **ang multi-cloud LLM strategy ng enterprise ay lilipat mula "multi-runtime" tungo sa "multi-frontier-vendor"**.

summary.en: **"Hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" graduates from finance pact to compute-stack lock-in by Q3 2026.** Apr 24's Google **$40B + 5GW** to Anthropic + the prior Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft's existing $13B+ to OpenAI mean the **top 3 frontier labs each have a hyperscaler underwriter — paid partly in compute capacity, not cash**. By Q3 2026, **frontier-model serving topology becomes dictated by funding origin**: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 ships natively on Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 stays Azure-first, and Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) double down on Huawei Ascend (per the Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). The "model-portability promise" of 2024-2025 quietly ends; **enterprise multi-cloud LLM strategy shifts from "multi-runtime" to "multi-frontier-vendor."**
summary.ja: **「ハイパースケーラー × AI ラボの資本結合」が金融的盟約から計算スタックの囲い込みへ移行、Q3 2026 に完成する。** 4/24 の Google **400 億ドル + 5GW** Anthropic 投資 + 直前の Amazon **250 億ドル + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft の既存 130 億ドル超 OpenAI 投資により、**フロンティア 3 ラボそれぞれに専属ハイパースケーラーが付き、しかも支払いの一部は計算キャパシティで決済される**構造が確立。Q3 2026 までに、**フロンティアモデルのサービング配置は資金提供元によって規定される**ようになる。Anthropic の Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 は Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google 経路) でネイティブ提供、OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 は Azure ファースト維持、中国系フロンティア (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) は Huawei Ascend にさらに傾斜 (4/26 Bloomberg-CCTV 記事の通り)。2024-2025 の「モデル可搬性の約束」は静かに終わり、**エンタープライズのマルチクラウド LLM 戦略は「マルチランタイム」から「マルチフロンティアベンダー」へ転換する**。
summary.es: **El "acoplamiento de capital hyperscaler-laboratorio AI" deja de ser pacto financiero para convertirse en bloqueo de la pila de cómputo durante el T3 2026.** El compromiso del 24/4 de Google **40.000 M$ + 5 GW** a Anthropic + el previo Amazon **25.000 M$ + 5 GW de Trainium2/3** + los más de 13.000 M$ históricos de Microsoft a OpenAI suponen que **los tres laboratorios frontera tienen un padrino hyperscaler — pagado en parte con capacidad de cómputo, no en metálico**. Para el T3 2026, **la topología de servicio de modelos frontera quedará dictada por el origen de la financiación**: Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nativo en Trainium2 + TPU v8 (vías Amazon + Google), GPT-5.5 / 6 sigue Azure-first y los laboratorios chinos (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) doblan apuesta por Huawei Ascend (según el artículo Bloomberg-CCTV del 26/4). La "promesa de portabilidad de modelos" de 2024-2025 se apaga; **la estrategia LLM multi-cloud de la empresa pasa de "multi-runtime" a "multi-vendor frontera"**.
summary.fil: **Magmamadali ang "hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" mula sa finance pact tungo sa compute-stack lock-in pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 24 Google **$40B + 5GW** sa Anthropic + ang naunang Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + ang umiiral na $13B+ ng Microsoft sa OpenAI ay nangangahulugang **bawat isa sa tatlong frontier labs ay may hyperscaler underwriter — bahagyang binabayaran sa pamamagitan ng compute capacity, hindi cash**. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **ang serving topology ng frontier models ay didiktahan ng pinanggalingan ng pondo**: Mag-ship ang Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nang native sa Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), magiging Azure-first pa rin ang OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6, at lalong magpopokus ang Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) sa Huawei Ascend (gaya ng nasa Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). Tahimik na matatapos ang "model-portability promise" ng 2024-2025; **ang multi-cloud LLM strategy ng enterprise ay lilipat mula "multi-runtime" tungo sa "multi-frontier-vendor"**.

nodes.label: **The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template — by Q4 2026 at least one other foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract is publicly amended to drop …
nodes.description: **The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template — by Q4 2026 at least one other foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract is publicly amended to drop a discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, replaced by fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Apr 27's Microsoft/OpenAI rewrite is no longer just about Azure exclusivity — it converts a binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk into a **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** and **multi-cloud distribution as the new default**. Google × Anthropic's $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic's $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, and the upcoming Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) all sit on similar capability-trigger language. **By Q4 2026 we see at least one of those contracts publicly restructured to mirror Apr 27's pattern** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. The "AGI" word becomes a financial-instrument primitive, not a metaphysical one.

short_label.es: El "deshilado de la cláusula AGI" sient…

description.en: **The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template — by Q4 2026 at least one other foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract is publicly amended to drop a discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, replaced by fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Apr 27's Microsoft/OpenAI rewrite is no longer just about Azure exclusivity — it converts a binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk into a **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** and **multi-cloud distribution as the new default**. Google × Anthropic's $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic's $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, and the upcoming Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) all sit on similar capability-trigger language. **By Q4 2026 we see at least one of those contracts publicly restructured to mirror Apr 27's pattern** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. The "AGI" word becomes a financial-instrument primitive, not a metaphysical one.
description.ja: **「AGI条項解消」がテンプレート化 — 2026年Q4までに少なくとももう1件の基盤モデルラボ × ハイパースケーラー契約が、裁量的な「能力トリガー」条項を破棄し、固定期限の収益シェア + 非独占的なクラウド配信に置き換えられる。** 4/27のMicrosoft / OpenAI再構築は単なるAzure独占の問題ではなく、二者択一の取締役会裁量によるIP消滅リスクを**カレンダーベースの収益キャップ(2030年)**と**マルチクラウド配信を新たなデフォルト**に変換した。Google × Anthropic の$40B / 5GW契約、Amazon × Anthropic の$5B + $25B / $100B AWSコミット、OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft、そして近日中に予定されているCerebras IPO($22B-$25B、5月中旬)はすべて同様の能力トリガー文言を含む。**2026年Q4までに、これらの契約のうち少なくとも1件が4/27のパターンを反映する形で公に再構築される** — 固定日付の収益キャップ、非独占ライセンス、マルチクラウド配信条項。「AGI」という語は形而上的概念ではなく、金融商品プリミティブとなる。
description.es: **El "deshilado de la cláusula AGI" sienta una plantilla — para Q4 2026 al menos otro contrato laboratorio-fundacional × hyperscaler se reformula públicamente para abandonar una cláusula discrecional de "gatillo de capacidad", reemplazada por reparto de ingresos con fecha fija + distribución multi-cloud no exclusiva.** La reescritura Microsoft / OpenAI del 27 abr ya no se trata sólo de exclusividad de Azure — convierte un riesgo binario, discrecional para el directorio, de revocación de PI en un **techo de ingresos basado en calendario (2030)** y **distribución multi-cloud como nuevo predeterminado**. El acuerdo Google × Anthropic de $40B / 5GW, el compromiso Amazon × Anthropic de $5B + $25B / $100B AWS, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, y la próxima IPO de Cerebras ($22B-$25B mediados de may) descansan sobre un lenguaje similar de gatillo de capacidad. **Para Q4 2026 veremos al menos uno de esos contratos públicamente reestructurado para reflejar el patrón del 27 abr** — techo de ingresos con fecha fija, licencia no exclusiva, cláusula de distribución multi-cloud. La palabra "AGI" se vuelve una primitiva de instrumento financiero, no una metafísica.
description.fil: **Ang "AGI-clause unwind" ay nagtatakda ng template — pagdating ng Q4 2026, may isa pang foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract na publicly amended para alisin ang isang discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, pinalitan ng fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Hindi na lang tungkol sa Azure exclusivity ang Apr 27 Microsoft / OpenAI rewrite — kino-convert nito ang binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk sa **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** at **multi-cloud distribution bilang bagong default**. Ang Google × Anthropic na $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic na $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, at ang papalapit na Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) lahat nakaupo sa parehong capability-trigger language. **Pagdating ng Q4 2026 makikita natin ang isa man lang sa mga kontratang ito na publicly restructured para tumugma sa pattern ng Apr 27** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. Magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI", hindi metaphysical.

Google × Anthropic's $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic's $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, and the upcoming Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) all sit on similar capability-trigger language. **By Q4 2026 we see at least one of those contracts publicly restructured to mirror Apr 27's pattern** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. The "AGI" word becomes a financial-instrument primitive, not a metaphysical one.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「AGI条項解消」がテンプレート化 — 2026年Q4までに少なくとももう1件の基盤モデルラボ × ハイパースケーラー契約が、裁量的な「能力トリガー」条項を破棄し、固定期限の収益シェア + 非独占的なクラウド配信に置き換えられる。** 4/27のMicrosoft / OpenAI再構築は単なるAzure独占の問題ではなく、二者択一の取締役会裁量によるIP消滅リスクを**カレンダーベースの収益キャップ(2030年)**と**マルチクラウド配信を新たなデフォルト**に変換した。Google × Anthropic の$40B / 5GW契約、Amazon × Anthropic の$5B + $25B / $100B AWSコミット、OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft、そして近日中に予定されているCerebras IPO($22B-$25B、5月中旬)はすべて同様の能力トリガー文言を含む。**2026年Q4までに、これらの契約のうち少なくとも1件が4/27のパターンを反映する形で公に再構築される** — 固定日付の収益キャップ、非独占ライセンス、マルチクラウド配信条項。「AGI」という語は形而上的概念ではなく、金融商品プリミティブとなる。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El "deshilado de la cláusula AGI" sienta una plantilla — para Q4 2026 al menos otro contrato laboratorio-fundacional × hyperscaler se reformula públicamente para abandonar una cláusula discrecional de "gatillo de capacidad", reemplazada por reparto de ingresos con fecha fija + distribución multi-cloud no exclusiva.** La reescritura Microsoft / OpenAI del 27 abr ya no se trata sólo de exclusividad de Azure — convierte un riesgo binario, discrecional para el directorio, de revocación de PI en un **techo de ingresos basado en calendario (2030)** y **distribución multi-cloud como nuevo predeterminado**. El acuerdo Google × Anthropic de $40B / 5GW, el compromiso Amazon × Anthropic de $5B + $25B / $100B AWS, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, y la próxima IPO de Cerebras ($22B-$25B mediados de may) descansan sobre un lenguaje similar de gatillo de capacidad. **Para Q4 2026 veremos al menos uno de esos contratos públicamente reestructurado para reflejar el patrón del 27 abr** — techo de ingresos con fecha fija, licencia no exclusiva, cláusula de distribución multi-cloud. La palabra "AGI" se vuelve una primitiva de instrumento financiero, no una metafísica.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang "AGI-clause unwind" ay nagtatakda ng template — pagdating ng Q4 2026, may isa pang foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract na publicly amended para alisin ang isang discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, pinalitan ng fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Hindi na lang tungkol sa Azure exclusivity ang Apr 27 Microsoft / OpenAI rewrite — kino-convert nito ang binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk sa **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** at **multi-cloud distribution bilang bagong default**. Ang Google × Anthropic na $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic na $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, at ang papalapit na Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) lahat nakaupo sa parehong capability-trigger language. **Pagdating ng Q4 2026 makikita natin ang isa man lang sa mga kontratang ito na publicly restructured para tumugma sa pattern ng Apr 27** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. Magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI", hindi metaphysical.

nodes.description: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs.

description.en: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs.
description.ja: **Q4 2026までに、KVキャッシュ圧縮dtypeはすべての主要推論スタックでファーストクラスのデプロイ・ノブとして露出する — vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLMが TurboQuant + 1つ以上の代替(KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention)を同梱した`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`(または同等)フラグを出荷する。** 4/27–29がこれをほぼ確実にしている: **TurboQuantがICLR 2026 + Google Researchブログに着地**、**SGLang PR #21419は既にツリー内**(融合カーネル書き換え#23134でbf16比93–105%スループット)、**NVIDIA kvpress**はDecoding-Press成熟、**PolyKV(arxiv 2604.24971)**がマルチエージェント共有プール量子化を実証、**コミュニティMLX + Triton + vLLM移植**がGoogleの公式Python実装(Q2 2026予定)に先行して流通。経済的な強制力は4/28のWSJ OpenAI未達が割ったMag 7キャペックス相場と同一: メモリ帯域律速の長コンテキスト・ワークロードがFP16から3.5ビットへ移れれば、トークン当たり実効コストは約5–6倍カットできる。Q4 2026までにハイパースケーラはBedrock/Azure/Vertexのトークン課金を圧縮キャッシュ・ティアにオプトイン依存させ、昨日レポートの「インクリメンタルGPUキャペックスへのハードキャップ」テーゼは GPUを減らすのではなくこのレバーで締まる。
description.es: **Para Q4 2026 el dtype de compresión de KV-cache se expone como un knob de despliegue de primera clase en cada stack de inferencia mayor — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM lanzan un flag `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o equivalente) con TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** El periodo 27–29 abr lo vuelve casi seguro: **TurboQuant aterriza en ICLR 2026 + blog de Google Research**, **el PR #21419 de SGLang ya está in-tree** con una rescritura de fused-kernel (#23134) llegando a 93–105% del throughput bf16, **NVIDIA kvpress** alcanza madurez en Decoding-Press, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demuestra cuantización con pool compartido multi-agente y **ports comunitarios MLX + Triton + vLLM** circulan antes de que llegue la liberación oficial Python de Google en Q2 2026. La función forzante económica es el mismo tape de capex Mag-7 que el reporte del WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI acaba de fracturar: cada workload long-context limitado por ancho de banda de memoria que pueda mover de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el costo efectivo por token unas 5–6x. Para Q4 2026 los hyperscalers condicionan los precios por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex a tiers opt-in de cache comprimido, y la tesis de hard-cap a capex GPU incremental del reporte de ayer aprieta vía esta palanca y no por menos GPUs.
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, isang first-class deployment knob na ang KV-cache-compression dtype sa bawat major inference stack — magla-launch ang vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM ng `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o katumbas) flag na may TurboQuant + di bababa sa isang alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Ginagawang halos siguradong ito ng Apr 27–29: **pumasok ang TurboQuant sa ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419** na may fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) na umabot ng 93–105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** sa Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** na nag-demo ng multi-agent shared-pool quantization, at **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** na umiikot bago pa man dumating ang opisyal na Python release ng Google sa Q2 2026. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag-7 capex tape na binitak ng Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na puwedeng lumipat mula FP16 patungo sa 3.5-bit ay nagbabawas ng effective per-token cost ng ~5–6x. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ipo-condition ng hyperscalers ang per-token pricing ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex sa opt-in compressed-cache tiers, at higpit ang thesis ng kahapon na hard-cap sa incremental GPU capex sa pamamagitan nitong lever, hindi sa pamamagitan ng pagbawas ng GPU.

By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs.

Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag-7 capex tape na binitak ng Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na puwedeng lumipat mula FP16 patungo sa 3.5-bit ay nagbabawas ng effective per-token cost ng ~5–6x. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ipo-condition ng hyperscalers ang per-token pricing ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex sa opt-in compressed-cache tiers, at higpit ang thesis ng kahapon na hard-cap sa incremental GPU capex sa pamamagitan nitong lever, hindi sa pamamagitan ng pagbawas ng GPU.

Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A.

description.en: **The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates a 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, or xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Mag-7 hyperscaler publishes Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure separated from raw cloud revenue.** WSJ Apr 28 was decisive: a single off-target-leak dropped Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% in one session, on top of the **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (which already removed the discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A.
description.ja: **OpenAI 4/28 WSJ報道は2026年の「AI売上開示の書き換え」を起動する — Q3 2026までに少なくとも1つのファウンデーションラボ(OpenAI、Anthropic、xAI)が監査済みの月次売上 + WAU開示ケイデンスを出荷し、Mag 7ハイパースケーラの少なくとも1社がBedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertexのトークン当たりマージンを生クラウド売上から分離して開示する。** 4/28のWSJは決定的だった: 単一の標的未達リークでOracleが4%、AMDが3%、Broadcomが4%、ソフトバンクが10%下落、しかも**4/27のOpenAI/Microsoft AGI条項撤回**(任意の「AGI宣言」によるIP取消リスクは既に消滅)に重ねての反応。Mag 7決算の集中 + 合算約7,000億ドルの2026キャペックス + 5月中旬の Cerebras IPO ($22B–$25B、G42 24% / MBZUAI 62%の売上集中)を合わせると、ウォール街は今や**ナラティブではなく具体的なAI収益学的開示を明示的に要求**している。Q3 2026までにSEC + アナリスト圧力で(a)少なくとも1ラボが公開月次売上 / WAUダッシュボード・ケイデンスへ、(b)Big-3クラウドの少なくとも1社が10-Q脚注でトークン当たりAIプラットフォーム・マージンを分離開示、を生む。「AGI」は形而上学的概念から金融商品プリミティブへ、「DAU/WAU」はプロダクトKPIからMD&Aへ昇格する。
description.es: **El reporte WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI inicia una "reescritura de la disclosure de revenue AI" en 2026 — para Q3 2026 al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) lanza una cadencia auditada de revenue mensual + WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Mag-7 publica disclosure de margen por token Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex separado del revenue cloud crudo.** El WSJ del 28-abr fue decisivo: una sola filtración de off-target tumbó Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% en una sola sesión, sumado al **rewind del AGI clause OpenAI/Microsoft del 27-abr** (que ya retiró el riesgo discrecional de revocación de IP por declaración AGI). Combinado con la colisión de reportes Mag-7 hoy + ~700 mil millones USD agregados de capex 2026 + el IPO Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22B–$25B (concentración 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), Wall Street ahora **exige explícitamente disclosure de economía AI tangible, no narrativa**. Para Q3 2026 la presión SEC + analistas produce (a) al menos un foundation lab moviéndose a una cadencia pública de dashboard de revenue mensual / WAU, y (b) al menos uno de los Big-3 cloud separando margen por token de plataforma AI en notas al pie del 10-Q. La palabra "AGI" pasa de metafísica a primitiva de instrumento financiero; "DAU/WAU" pasa de KPI de producto a MD&A.
description.fil: **Sinisimulan ng OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report ang isang 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — pagsapit ng Q3 2026, magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) ng audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, at maglalathala ng di bababa sa isang Mag-7 hyperscaler ng Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure na hiwalay sa raw cloud revenue.** Mapagpasya ang WSJ Apr 28: isang off-target leak lang ay nagpababa kay Oracle ng 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% sa isang session, plus pa rin ng **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (na inalis na ang discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Kasabay ng Mag-7 prints collision ngayon + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B–$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), **buong-buo at hayagang hinihingi na ng Wall Street ang tangible AI-economics disclosure, hindi narrative**. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang SEC + analyst pressure ay magbubunga ng (a) di bababa sa isang foundation lab na lumipat sa public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, at (b) di bababa sa isang Big-3 cloud na ihihiwalay ang per-token AI-platform margin sa 10-Q footnotes. Mula metaphysical ay magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI"; mula product KPI ay magiging MD&A material ang "DAU/WAU".

nodes.label: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic…
nodes.short_label: By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surf…
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates.

description.en: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates.
description.ja: **H2 2026までにエージェント・スキルの攻撃面が独自のMITRE ATT&CKスタイルのサブマトリクスを取得し、少なくとも1つの主要スキル・マーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills/agent traces)が署名 + プロビナンス必須ゲートを出荷する。** ClawHavocのClawHub内1,184個の悪性スキル + OpenClawマーケットプレイス全体での**Cisco 36%プロンプトインジェクション率**は、もはや一過性ではない — 4/28のNovita SandboxはOpenClaw + Hermes + 自律エージェント・ランタイム専用に作られた最初の商用緩和プロダクト。Corpus2Skillが「ナビゲート可能なアーティファクトとしてのスキル」を主流化し、Externalization-in-LLM-Agentsサーベイ(arxiv 2604.08224)がskills/harness/protocolを2026支配的設計層と位置付けたことで、攻撃面は**サイドチャネルではなくファーストクラス・インフラ**になった。H2 2026までに(a)スキル汚染 + スキル経由の間接プロンプトインジェクション + クロススキル特権チェーンを網羅した公開エージェント・スキル脅威マトリクス(MITREスタイルまたはNIST主導)、および(b)公開前に署名 + プロビナンス証明済みスキルを義務化する主要マーケットプレイス、をAnthropicの17スキルレポ、ClawHub、Multicaマーケットプレイス、Hugging Faceエージェント・トレース面の中から最初の候補が出す。
description.es: **Para H2 2026 la superficie de ataque skills-de-agente aterriza su propia sub-matriz estilo MITRE ATT&CK y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (skills oficiales de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills/agent traces de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance.** Los 1.184 skills maliciosos de ClawHavoc en ClawHub + el **36% de prompt-injection rate de Cisco en el marketplace OpenClaw** ya no es un evento aislado — el Sandbox de Novita del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido de propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes + agentes autónomos. Con Corpus2Skill volviendo mainstream "skills como artefacto navegable" y la encuesta Externalization-in-LLM-Agents (arxiv 2604.08224) llamando skills/harness/protocol la capa de diseño dominante de 2026, la superficie de ataque ahora es **infraestructura de primera clase**, no un side-channel. Para H2 2026 vemos (a) una matriz de amenazas agent-skills publicada (estilo MITRE o liderada por NIST) cubriendo poisoning de skills + indirect-prompt-injection vía skill + cadenas de privilegios cross-skill, y (b) al menos un marketplace mayor obligando skills firmadas y atestadas con provenance antes de publicar — con el repo 17-skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, el marketplace de Multica y la superficie agent-trace de Hugging Face como primeros candidatos.
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, magkakaroon ng sariling MITRE ATT&CK-style sub-matrix ang attack surface ng agent skills, at magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (official skills ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ng enforced signing + provenance gate.** Hindi na one-off ang 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc sa ClawHub + ang **36% prompt-injection rate ng Cisco sa OpenClaw skill marketplace** — ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na purposely-built para sa OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. Sa pagiging mainstream ng "skills bilang navigable artifact" ng Corpus2Skill at sa pagturing ng Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) sa skills/harness/protocol bilang dominant 2026 design layer, **first-class infrastructure** na ang attack surface, hindi na side-channel. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, makikita natin (a) isang published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style o NIST-led) na sumasakop ng skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, at (b) di bababa sa isang major marketplace na nag-mandate ng signed-and-provenance-attested skills bago publish — kasama ang 17-skill repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, marketplace ng Multica, at agent-trace surface ng Hugging Face bilang unang kandidato.

nodes.short_label: Tech) By Q3 2026 a published agent-skil…
nodes.description: **(Tech) By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.

description.en: **(Tech) By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.
description.ja: **(技術) 2026年 Q3 までに、エージェントスキル脅威サブマトリックスが MITRE ATT&CK 拡張または NIST AI-RMF 付録として最初の正式公開を迎え、少なくとも 1つの主要スキルマーケットプレイス (Anthropic 公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face スキル) が公開前に署名 + プロベナンス検証ゲートを強制する。** 4/28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 フレームワークは AI エージェントコンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェントデプロイを既にテクニックとして命名済み; 4/28 Novita Sandbox は OpenClaw + Hermes ランタイム専用に構築された初の商用緩和製品; 4/28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite、SuiteConnect SF) は署名配布をセキュリティフレームとしてスキルを製品化した初の主要非ファウンデーションラボベンダー; 4/28 arxiv 2604.24026 (スキルの SSL 表現) + 4/24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint が学術的足場を提供。強制関数は Cisco RSAC 2026 36% プロンプトインジェクション率の発見 + ClawHavoc 1,184件の悪意あるスキル + 4/23-29 Google +32% IPI 増加; 合わせると、これは 2017年の MITRE ATT&CK Mobile と 2021年の MITRE ATLAS を生み出したのと同じガバナンスギャップの軌跡。これらの最初の義務化はファウンデーションラボからではなく、CISA / NIST から、あるいはエンタープライズ顧客圧力下のマーケットプレイス事業者から直接出る可能性が高い。
description.es: **(Tecnológica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensión MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** ATT&CK v19 del 28-abr + el marco v5.4 ya nombran envenenamiento de contexto de agentes IA, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP y despliegue de agentes maliciosos como técnicas; Novita Sandbox del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido a propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes; SuiteCloud Agent Skills del 28-abr (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) es el primer gran proveedor no-foundation-lab que distribuye habilidades como producto con distribución firmada como marco de seguridad; arxiv 2604.24026 (representación SSL para habilidades) del 28-abr + arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint del 24-abr aportan el andamiaje académico. La función forzada es el hallazgo de Cisco RSAC 2026 del 36% de inyección de prompts + las 1.184 habilidades maliciosas de ClawHavoc + el repunte +32% IPI de Google del 23-29 abr; combinado, es el mismo arco de brecha de gobernanza que produjo MITRE ATT&CK Mobile en 2017 y MITRE ATLAS en 2021. La primera de estas obligaciones probablemente venga de CISA / NIST o directamente de los operadores del marketplace bajo presión de clientes empresariales, no de un foundation lab.
description.fil: **(Tech) Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Pinangalanan na ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework ang AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, at malicious agent deployment bilang techniques; ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na ginawa para sa OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; ang Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) ang unang major non-foundation-lab vendor na nag-ship ng skills-as-a-product na may signed-distribution bilang security frame; ang Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint ang nagbibigay ng academic scaffolding. Ang forcing function ay ang Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; pinagsama-sama, ito ang parehong governance-gap arc na nagbunga ng MITRE ATT&CK Mobile noong 2017 at MITRE ATLAS noong 2021. Ang una sa mga mandates na ito ay malamang manggagaling sa CISA / NIST o direkta mula sa marketplace operators sa ilalim ng enterprise-customer pressure, hindi mula sa foundation lab.

nodes.label: **(Non-tech) The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disc…
nodes.description: **(Non-tech) The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue or WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Big-3 hyperscaler separates Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin in 10-Q footnotes from raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) was the first material crack in the AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints were a mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints close the Mag 7 cycle. Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have.

description.en: **(Non-tech) The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue or WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Big-3 hyperscaler separates Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin in 10-Q footnotes from raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) was the first material crack in the AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints were a mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints close the Mag 7 cycle. Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have.
description.ja: **(非技術) 4/28 WSJ OpenAI 売上未達報道 + 4/29 Mag 7 決算同時発表が 2026年に SEC + アナリストの AI 売上開示書き換え圧力を発動 — 2026年 Q3 までに、少なくとも 1つのファウンデーションラボ (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) が監査済み月次売上または WAU 開示サイクルを出荷し、少なくとも 1つの Big-3 ハイパースケーラーが Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex のトークン単価マージンを 10-Q 脚注で生クラウド売上から分離する。** 4/28 の売り (S&P -0.49%、Nasdaq -0.9%、Oracle -4%、AMD -3%、Broadcom -4%、SoftBank -10%) は AI 設備投資オン信用テープに最初の物理的亀裂; 4/29 決算は混合リセット (MSFT/GOOGL は強気ビート、META AH -7%); 4/30 AAPL 決算で Mag 7 サイクル終了。Microsoft は既に AI 年換算売上 $37B (+123%) を明示的に引用 — それが開示の前例。Cerebras IPO 5月中旬 $22B-$25B (G42 24% / MBZUAI 62% 売上集中) を背景に、SEC + バイサイドのトークン単価マージン + WAU 開示要求は 2026年 Q2-Q3 決算サイクル前後に集中する。Powell がトランプ政権 Fed 調査への抑止として理事会に残る決定も AI 設備投資テープ全体の政治リスクプレミアムを引き上げる; より厳しい数字を要求するのが公的市場のレバー。
description.es: **(No tecnológica) El reportaje del WSJ del 28-abr sobre incumplimiento de ingresos de OpenAI + la colisión de resultados Mag 7 del 29-abr disparan una reescritura del régimen de divulgación de ingresos de IA por parte de la SEC y los analistas en 2026 — para Q3 2026, al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) publica una cadencia de divulgación auditada de ingresos mensuales o WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 separa el margen por token de Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex en las notas al pie del 10-Q de los ingresos cloud brutos.** La caída del 28-abr (S&P -0,49%, Nasdaq -0,9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) fue la primera grieta material en la cinta «capex IA por fe»; los resultados del 29-abr fueron un reset mixto (MSFT/GOOGL batieron con fuerza, META -7% AH); los resultados de AAPL del 30-abr cierran el ciclo Mag 7. Microsoft ya citó explícitamente una tasa anual de IA de $37B (+123%) — ese es el precedente de divulgación. Con la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22B-$25B (concentración de ingresos 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), la presión SEC + buyside para divulgación explícita de margen por token + WAU converge alrededor de los ciclos de resultados Q2-Q3 2026. La decisión de Powell de quedarse en la Junta como freno a la investigación Fed de Trump también eleva la prima de riesgo político sobre toda la cinta de capex IA; exigir cifras más duras es la palanca que tienen los mercados públicos.
description.fil: **(Non-tech) Ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision ay magti-trigger ng 2026 SEC + analyst push para sa AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — bago matapos ang Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ang magsi-ship ng audited monthly-revenue o WAU disclosure cadence, at hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang magbubukod ng Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin sa 10-Q footnotes mula sa raw cloud revenue.** Ang Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) ang unang material crack sa AI-capex-on-faith tape; ang Apr 29 prints ay mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL malakas na beat, META -7% AH); ang Apr 30 AAPL prints ang nagsasara sa Mag 7 cycle. Tahasang sinipi na ng Microsoft ang $37B AI run rate (+123%) — iyon ang disclosure precedent. Sa Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), ang SEC + buyside pressure para sa explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure ay magko-converge sa Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Board bilang check sa Trump-admin Fed investigation ay nagdadagdag din ng political-risk premium sa buong AI-capex tape; ang paghingi ng mas matitigas na numero ang lever ng public markets.

With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have.
summary.ja: **(非技術) 4/28 WSJ OpenAI 売上未達報道 + 4/29 Mag 7 決算同時発表が 2026年に SEC + アナリストの AI 売上開示書き換え圧力を発動 — 2026年 Q3 までに、少なくとも 1つのファウンデーションラボ (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) が監査済み月次売上または WAU 開示サイクルを出荷し、少なくとも 1つの Big-3 ハイパースケーラーが Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex のトークン単価マージンを 10-Q 脚注で生クラウド売上から分離する。** 4/28 の売り (S&P -0.49%、Nasdaq -0.9%、Oracle -4%、AMD -3%、Broadcom -4%、SoftBank -10%) は AI 設備投資オン信用テープに最初の物理的亀裂; 4/29 決算は混合リセット (MSFT/GOOGL は強気ビート、META AH -7%); 4/30 AAPL 決算で Mag 7 サイクル終了。Microsoft は既に AI 年換算売上 $37B (+123%) を明示的に引用 — それが開示の前例。Cerebras IPO 5月中旬 $22B-$25B (G42 24% / MBZUAI 62% 売上集中) を背景に、SEC + バイサイドのトークン単価マージン + WAU 開示要求は 2026年 Q2-Q3 決算サイクル前後に集中する。Powell がトランプ政権 Fed 調査への抑止として理事会に残る決定も AI 設備投資テープ全体の政治リスクプレミアムを引き上げる; より厳しい数字を要求するのが公的市場のレバー。
summary.es: **(No tecnológica) El reportaje del WSJ del 28-abr sobre incumplimiento de ingresos de OpenAI + la colisión de resultados Mag 7 del 29-abr disparan una reescritura del régimen de divulgación de ingresos de IA por parte de la SEC y los analistas en 2026 — para Q3 2026, al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) publica una cadencia de divulgación auditada de ingresos mensuales o WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 separa el margen por token de Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex en las notas al pie del 10-Q de los ingresos cloud brutos.** La caída del 28-abr (S&P -0,49%, Nasdaq -0,9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) fue la primera grieta material en la cinta «capex IA por fe»; los resultados del 29-abr fueron un reset mixto (MSFT/GOOGL batieron con fuerza, META -7% AH); los resultados de AAPL del 30-abr cierran el ciclo Mag 7. Microsoft ya citó explícitamente una tasa anual de IA de $37B (+123%) — ese es el precedente de divulgación. Con la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22B-$25B (concentración de ingresos 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), la presión SEC + buyside para divulgación explícita de margen por token + WAU converge alrededor de los ciclos de resultados Q2-Q3 2026. La decisión de Powell de quedarse en la Junta como freno a la investigación Fed de Trump también eleva la prima de riesgo político sobre toda la cinta de capex IA; exigir cifras más duras es la palanca que tienen los mercados públicos.
summary.fil: **(Non-tech) Ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision ay magti-trigger ng 2026 SEC + analyst push para sa AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — bago matapos ang Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ang magsi-ship ng audited monthly-revenue o WAU disclosure cadence, at hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang magbubukod ng Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin sa 10-Q footnotes mula sa raw cloud revenue.** Ang Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) ang unang material crack sa AI-capex-on-faith tape; ang Apr 29 prints ay mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL malakas na beat, META -7% AH); ang Apr 30 AAPL prints ang nagsasara sa Mag 7 cycle. Tahasang sinipi na ng Microsoft ang $37B AI run rate (+123%) — iyon ang disclosure precedent. Sa Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), ang SEC + buyside pressure para sa explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure ay magko-converge sa Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Board bilang check sa Trump-admin Fed investigation ay nagdadagdag din ng political-risk premium sa buong AI-capex tape; ang paghingi ng mas matitigas na numero ang lever ng public markets.

nodes.description: **Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.** Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's "proprietary, API-only" pivot, alongside Anthropic's staged gating of Mythos Preview, makes Q3 2026 the moment **"strongest model = closed weights"** crystallizes. Open weights, meanwhile, concentrate on the 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama lines for production, formalizing the line: local for utility, cloud for the frontier.

short_label.ja: プロプライエタリ再膨張とオープンウェイトの地政学分断

description.en: **Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.** Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's "proprietary, API-only" pivot, alongside Anthropic's staged gating of Mythos Preview, makes Q3 2026 the moment **"strongest model = closed weights"** crystallizes. Open weights, meanwhile, concentrate on the 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama lines for production, formalizing the line: local for utility, cloud for the frontier.
description.ja: **プロプライエタリ再膨張とオープンウェイトの地政学分断** — Qwen3.6-Max-Preview が「プロプライエタリのまま API のみ公開」に舵を切った点、Anthropic も Mythos Preview で段階ゲーティング化した点から、2026 Q3 には**「最強モデル＝非オープンウェイト」が明確化**。一方、オープンウェイトは 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama 系に最適化が集中し、ローカル = 実用帯、クラウド = フロンティアという線引きが制度化される。
